## Editor picks

- **[Bitwarden](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=bitwarden)** - Bitwarden is a widely used open-source password manager offering end-to-end encryption and transparent security design. It supports browser extensions, desktop and mobile apps, and optional self-hosting for users who want full control over their password vault ⭐ 13k
- **[Brave Search](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=bravesearch)** - Brave Search is a privacy-oriented search engine built on an independent index. It does not track users or rely on personal profiles, and is integrated into the Brave browser as an optional default search provider
- **[LibreWolf](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=librewolf)** - LibreWolf is a fork of Firefox focused on privacy and security. Telemetry and data collection features are removed, and hardened default settings provide safer browsing without compromising the open-source philosophy
- **[Proton VPN ](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=protonvpn70off)** - Browse the internet privately with a secure VPN that protects your online privacy
- **[Tor Browser](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=torbrowser)** - Tor Browser anonymizes your browsing by routing traffic through the Tor network, encrypting connections, and hiding your IP address ⭐ 5k
- [Proton VPN for Business](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=protonvpnforbusiness) - Shield your company network with Proton VPN for Business. Defend against online threats, enable secure remote work, and deploy encrypted VPN protection in minutes. Trusted by thousands of organizations worldwide. Start your free trial today. Sign up now
- [Signal](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=signal) - Signal is a free and open-source messaging application providing end-to-end encrypted text, voice, and video communication. It is widely recommended for private conversations due to its strong cryptography and minimal data retention `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 29k
- [StartMail](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=startmail) - Privacy-focused, ad-free email provider with unlimited burner aliases, IMAP-based end-to-end encryption

## VPN services

- **[Mullvad VPN](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=mullvadvpn)** - Mullvad VPN is a Sweden-based VPN service built around anonymity and transparency
- **[Privado Secure](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=privadosecure)** - Privado Secure is a Switzerland-based VPN provider offering strong encryption
- **[Private Internet Access](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=privateinternetaccess)** - Private Internet Access is a long-standing VPN provider known for its configurable security options and court-tested no-logs claims. It supports open-source clients, advanced encryption settings, and runs on a wide range of devices
- [Get All-Around Online Protection with NordVPN — 70% OFF](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=getallaroundonlineprotectionwithnordvpn70off) - NordVPN is a Panama-based VPN service offering strong encryption, a large global server network, and independently audited no-logs policies. It provides all-around online protection with features like a kill switch, malware and tracker blocking, and fast performance across multiple devices. Special deal: Get 70% off NordVPN and enjoy a premium VPN experience for less backed by a 30-day money-back guarantee
- [Ivacy VPN](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=ivacyvpn) - Ivacy VPN is a Singapore-based provider offering encrypted connections and optimized servers for peer-to-peer and streaming use
- [PureVPN](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=purevpnsecurefastandglobalvpn) - Secure, Fast & Global VPN

## Privacy browsers

- [Brave Browser](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=bravebrowser) - Brave Browser is a fast, Chromium-based web browser that blocks ads and trackers by default
- [CloakBrowser](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=cloakbrowser) - Open-source stealth Chromium browser for Playwright and Puppeteer automation with source-level fingerprint protection and anti-bot evasion capabilities `MIT` ⭐ 27k
- [Firecrawl](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=firecrawl) - Open-source web scraping and crawling platform that converts websites into clean LLM-ready data for AI agents and applications `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 142k
- [Firefox](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=firefox) - Firefox is a widely used open-source browser emphasizing user privacy and security ⭐ 3.7k
- [Ungoogled Chromium](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=ungoogledchromium) - Ungoogled Chromium is a Chromium-based browser that removes Google integration and background services. It offers a privacy-first browsing experience while maintaining compatibility with Chrome extensions and updates `BSD-3-Clause` ⭐ 27k
- [Vivaldi](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=vivaldi) - Vivaldi is a feature-rich browser built on Chromium with a strong focus on user privacy — blocking trackers and unwanted ads, offering encrypted sync, and giving users deep customization options for tabs, layouts, and workflows. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}

## Secure email

- **[Proton Mail](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=protonmail)** - End-to-end encrypted email service based in Switzerland
- [BillionMail](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=billionmail) - Open-source email server and marketing platform for sending newsletters and campaigns at scale `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 15k
- [Bitmask](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=bitmask) - Bitmask is a free and open-source client that enables encrypted email and VPN services through compatible providers `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 65
- [Cypht](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=cypht) - Open-source modular webmail and unified inbox platform that combines multiple email accounts, news feeds, and messaging protocols into a single privacy-friendly interface `LGPL-2.1` ⭐ 1.6k
- [Fast Mail](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=fastmail) - Private, fast, and ad-free email hosting service with custom domains
- [K-9 Mail](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=k9mail) - K-9 Mail is a long-standing open-source email client for Android focused on security, transparency, and user control. It supports IMAP and POP3 accounts, integrates with OpenPGP for encrypted email, and contains no tracking, ads, or proprietary analytics. Ideal for users who want a trustworthy local email client without relying on closed ecosystems `Apache-2.0` ⭐ 14k
- [Mailu](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=mailu) - Open-source, Docker-based mail server providing a full-featured, self-hosted email solution with IMAP, SMTP, webmail, and strong security features ⭐ 7.3k
- [Molly](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=molly) - Privacy-focused Signal-compatible messaging app for Android with encrypted local storage, advanced security controls, and Google-free notification support `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 3.5k
- [Posteo](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=posteo) - Posteo is a German email provider known for strong privacy policies, anonymous signup, and sustainable green hosting. It offers encrypted storage, no ads, and minimal data collection. Posteo is ideal for users who value ethical infrastructure, transparency, and long-term digital sustainability
- [SimpleLogin](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=simplelogin) - SimpleLogin allows you to create email aliases that forward messages to your real inbox, `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 6.8k
- [Tuta](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=tuta) - Tuta is a privacy-focused email provider headquartered in Germany, offering automatic end-to-end encryption for emails, contacts, and calendars. It operates without ads, tracking, or data mining and follows strict GDPR regulations. Apps are available for all major platforms, making it a solid choice for users seeking secure everyday email `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 7.7k

## Password managers

- [KeeWeb](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=keeweb) - KeeWeb is a free and open-source password manager compatible with KeePass databases. It supports offline usage, local file storage, and optional cloud synchronization, making it suitable for users who prefer local control ⭐ 13k
- [NordPass](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=nordpass) - NordPass is a password manager designed for ease of use and cross-platform compatibility. It uses modern encryption standards and offers cloud-based synchronization, making it suitable for users seeking a simple and polished password management solution
- [Passbolt](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=passbolt) - Passbolt is an open-source password manager designed primarily for teams and organizations. It supports end-to-end encryption using OpenPGP and can be self-hosted, giving administrators full control over infrastructure and data `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 6k
- [Proton Pass](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=protonpass) - Proton Pass is an end-to-end encrypted password manager `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 724

## Encrypted cloud

- **[Nextcloud](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=nextcloud)** - Nextcloud allows you to fully control your cloud storage with optional end-to-end encryption. Ideal for users who want total data ownership `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 36k
- [Ceph](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=ceph) - Open-source distributed storage platform providing object, block, and file storage with high scalability, reliability, and fault tolerance ⭐ 17k
- [Cloudreve](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=cloudreve) - Open-source self-hosted file management and cloud storage platform with multi-cloud support, WebDAV access, online file previews, sharing tools, and collaborative file management features `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 28k
- [Filestash](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=filestash) - Self-hosted web-based file manager with support for FTP, SFTP, WebDAV, S3, SMB, IPFS, and many other storage protocols `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 14k
- [Firefiles](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=firefiles) - Open-source Dropbox alternative for managing cloud storage buckets through a modern web interface `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 371
- [Hoodik](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=hoodik) - Lightweight self-hosted end-to-end encrypted cloud storage with browser-side encryption, secure search, encrypted notes, and S3-compatible storage support ⭐ 1.3k
- [IDrive](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=idrive) - Encrypted cloud backup and disaster recovery platform offering endpoint backup, snapshots, private-key encryption, and cross-platform support for personal and business data protection
- [MEGA](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=mega) - MEGA encrypts files locally before upload and offers generous free storage. Users keep control of encryption keys for stored files
- [Papra](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=papra) - Minimalistic self-hosted document management and archiving platform for long-term storage and retrieval `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 4.9k
- [Proton Drive](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=protondrive) - A secure home for your most important files, Proton Drive keeps your data private with end to end encryption, so only you can access it, not even Proton
- [Puter](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=puter) - Open-source internet operating system for personal cloud storage, apps, and browser-based desktop computing `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 43k
- [Seafile](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=seafile) - Self-hosted cloud storage platform focused on file syncing, privacy, and team collaboration ⭐ 15k
- [Spacedrive](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=spacedrive) - Local-first cross-device file manager and data platform for organizing files across disks, cloud storage, and devices ⭐ 38k
- [Sync.com](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=synccom) - Sync.com provides end-to-end encrypted file storage and sharing with strong privacy protections and no third-party access to your data
- [Tresorit](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=tresorit) - Tresorit is a high-security encrypted cloud storage solution trusted by businesses and journalists. Files are encrypted locally before upload
- [Twake Drive](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=twakedrive) - Open-source file storage and collaboration platform designed as an alternative to Google Drive `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 962

## Private messaging

- **[Session](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=session)** - Session is a decentralized messaging platform that does not require phone numbers or email addresses to create an account. Messages are routed through a distributed network, reducing metadata exposure and central points of control `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 1.9k
- [Element](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=element) - Element is a messaging client built on the Matrix protocol, enabling federated and decentralized communication. Users can choose public or self-hosted servers and enable end-to-end encryption for private conversations `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 13k
- [Jami](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=jami) - Jami is a peer-to-peer communication platform offering encrypted messaging, audio, and video calls without central servers. Accounts are created locally, and communication occurs directly between users when possible ⭐ 261
- [Threema](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=threema) - Threema is a paid messaging application based in Switzerland that focuses on privacy and minimal data collection. It allows anonymous account creation and provides end-to-end encrypted messaging and calls

## File encryption

- [age](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=age) - age is a modern encryption tool designed to be simpler and safer than traditional solutions. It focuses on secure defaults, minimal configuration, and strong cryptography for encrypting files `BSD-3-Clause` ⭐ 23k
- [Cryptomator](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=cryptomator) - Cryptomator encrypts files locally before they are uploaded to cloud services. It allows users to keep control of their data while using existing cloud storage providers. All encryption happens client-side with open-source, auditable code `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 16k
- [GnuPG](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=gnupg) - GNU Privacy Guard is a complete and free implementation of the OpenPGP standard. It allows users to encrypt and sign files securely and is widely used in privacy-focused workflows and secure communications `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 953
- [PeaZip](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=peazip) - PeaZip is an open-source file archiver that supports strong AES-256 encryption. It allows users to compress, encrypt, and securely manage archives with a graphical interface `LGPL-3.0` ⭐ 7.6k
- [restic](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=restic) - Fast, secure, and efficient open-source backup program for Linux, macOS, and Windows with encrypted snapshots and support for local, SFTP, S3, B2, Azure, and many more backends `BSD-2-Clause` ⭐ 35k
- [VeraCrypt](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=veracrypt) - VeraCrypt is a widely trusted open-source encryption tool that allows users to encrypt files, folders, and entire disks using strong cryptographic algorithms. It supports hidden volumes and is commonly used to protect sensitive data against unauthorized access ⭐ 11k

## File sharing & sync

- **[Syncthing](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=syncthing)** - Decentralized encrypted file synchronization without central servers `MPL-2.0` ⭐ 86k
- [AlterSend](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=altersend) - Open source peer-to-peer file transfer app, send files directly between devices with end-to-end encryption, no accounts, no cloud storage, and no size limits ⭐ 773
- [OnionShare](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=onionshare) - OnionShare enables secure and anonymous file sharing using the Tor network without intermediaries or central servers ⭐ 7k
- [PairDrop](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=pairdrop) - Open-source local and internet file sharing in the browser, inspired by AirDrop — with peer-to-peer transfers, device pairing, public rooms, and no installation required `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 11k
- [Slink](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=slink) - Open-source self-hosted image sharing platform with privacy-first shares, password protection, expiring links, collections, and SSO support `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 1.6k

## Encrypted photos

- **[Ente Photos](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=entephotos)** - Ente Photos provides end-to-end encrypted photo backups with zero-knowledge architecture. Only you can access your photos, even the service provider cannot view your data `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 27k
- **[Immich](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=immich)** - Self-hosted private photo backup solution `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 105k

- [PiGallery2](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=pigallery2) - Fast, directory-first self-hosted photo gallery optimized for low-resource servers like Raspberry Pi, with read-only access to your photo folder `MIT` ⭐ 2.2k

- [Hypersomnia](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=hypersomnia) - Fast-paced open-source top-down tactical shooter featuring moddable gameplay, dedicated servers, map editor, and competitive multiplayer `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 1.6k

- [Veloren](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=veloren) - Open-source multiplayer voxel RPG inspired by Cube World, Breath of the Wild, Minecraft, and Dwarf Fortress with exploration, combat, and community-driven development `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 7.4k

- [Harbor stremio](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=harborstremio) - Open-source desktop media player and Stremio client with a native player, watch parties, Live TV, themes, stream ranking, and deep media discovery features `MIT` ⭐ 708

## Private search

- [DuckDuckGo](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=duckduckgo) - DuckDuckGo is a search engine designed to protect user privacy by avoiding tracking, profiling, and personalized search histories. It delivers search results sourced from multiple providers while keeping user queries anonymous
- [SearXNG](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=searxng) - SearXNG is a free and open-source metasearch engine that aggregates results from multiple search providers while avoiding user tracking. It can be self-hosted or accessed through public instances for greater control and transparency `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 33k
- [Startpage](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=startpage) - Startpage provides Google search results while acting as a privacy-protective intermediary. User searches are not logged or tracked, allowing access to comprehensive results without exposing personal data to Google

## Privacy maps

- [AdventureLog](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=adventurelog) - Open-source travel companion for tracking adventures, planning trips, mapping visited locations, and collaborating on itineraries with friends and family ⭐ 3.4k
- [HERE WeGo](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=herewego) - HERE WeGo provides global maps and turn-by-turn navigation without requiring a Google account. While not fully open-source, it offers an alternative to Google Maps with offline capabilities
- [MAPS.ME](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=mapsme) - MAPS.ME offers offline world maps and navigation based on OpenStreetMap data. It is popular for travel use, allowing users to navigate without a constant internet connection
- [OpenStreetMap](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=openstreetmap) - OpenStreetMap is a global, community-driven mapping project that provides free and openly licensed geographic data. It is widely used as a privacy-friendly alternative to proprietary map services
- [Organic Maps](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=organicmaps) - Organic Maps is a fast, offline-first map application based on OpenStreetMap. It contains no ads, no trackers, and no data collection, making it ideal for privacy-conscious navigation
- [OSIRIS](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=osiris) - Real-time OSINT intelligence platform for monitoring flights, maritime activity, CCTV networks, earthquakes, conflicts, weather, cyber threats, and global news `MIT` ⭐ 6.3k
- [OsmAnd](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=osmand) - OsmAnd is a powerful navigation app built on OpenStreetMap data. It supports offline maps, route planning, and privacy-friendly features without relying on proprietary tracking services

## YouTube alternatives

- [FreeTube](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=freetube) - FreeTube is a desktop application that allows users to watch YouTube videos without ads or tracking. All subscriptions and data are stored locally, keeping your viewing habits private `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 21k
- [Invidious](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=invidious) - Invidious is a privacy-focused YouTube frontend that allows users to watch videos without contacting Google servers directly. It removes ads, tracking scripts, and can be self-hosted for maximum privacy `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 20k
- [Loops](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=loops-server) - Federated short video sharing platform built for the fediverse `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 420
- [NewPipe](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=newpipe) - NewPipe is a lightweight, privacy-respecting YouTube client for Android. It does not use Google services, shows no ads, and allows background playback and video downloads without tracking `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 39k
- [Odysee](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=odysee) - Odysee is a video-sharing platform built on the LBRY protocol. It provides an alternative to YouTube without requiring a Google account, though it is more centralized and less privacy-focused than PeerTube
- [Open Video Downloader](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=open-video-downloader) - Cross-platform open-source GUI for yt-dlp to download videos, audio, subtitles, and metadata from hundreds of websites without using the command line `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 8.8k
- [Piped](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=piped) - Piped is a fast and modern privacy-focused frontend for YouTube. It proxies video requests through its own servers, preventing Google from tracking users while offering subscriptions and playlists `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 10k

- [Kopuz](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=kopuz) - Modern, lightweight open-source music player built with Rust and Dioxus, supporting local libraries, Jellyfin/Subsonic streaming, YouTube Music, and SoundCloud `MIT` ⭐ 1.6k

- [Navidrome](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=navidrome) - Open-source self-hosted music streaming server for personal audio collections `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 22k

- [BookWyrm](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=bookwyrm) - Federated, open-source social reading network for tracking books, writing reviews, and connecting with readers via ActivityPub — a privacy-respecting alternative to GoodReads ⭐ 2.7k
- [CrossPoint Reader](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=crosspoint-reader) - Open-source firmware replacement for the Xteink X4 e-paper reader with EPUB support and customizable reading features `MIT` ⭐ 5.7k

- [Stump](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=stump) - Free and open-source self-hosted comics, manga, and digital book server with OPDS support `MIT` ⭐ 2.5k

## Encrypted notes

- **[Standard Notes](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=standardnotes)** - Standard Notes is a privacy-first encrypted notebook designed for long-term writing and knowledge storage. All notes are protected with end-to-end encryption and synced securely across devices `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 6.5k
- [Cryptee](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=cryptee) - Cryptee Docs is a zero-knowledge encrypted notebook and document editor. It runs fully in the browser and ensures that only you can access your notes and files
- [Joplin](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=joplin) - Joplin is a powerful open-source notebook that supports end-to-end encryption and syncing via Nextcloud, WebDAV, or local storage. Ideal for users who want full control ⭐ 55k
- [Logseq](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=logseq) - Privacy-first, open-source knowledge management and collaboration platform with outliner-based note-taking and bidirectional linking `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 44k
- [Notesnook](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=notesnook) - Notesnook is an open-source encrypted notebook built for privacy and offline use. It supports markdown, zero-knowledge encryption, and seamless sync without tracking `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 14k
- [Open Notebook](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=open-notebook) - Open-source, privacy-focused NotebookLM alternative with multi-model AI support, local deployment, podcasts, and intelligent research tools `MIT` ⭐ 34k
- [SurfSense](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=surfsense) - Open-source AI knowledge workspace and NotebookLM alternative with unlimited sources, multiplayer collaboration, and self-hosted AI support `Apache-2.0` ⭐ 15k
- [Tolaria](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=tolaria) - Open-source desktop app for managing markdown knowledge bases with Git versioning, offline-first design, and AI agent support `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 18k
- [Turtl](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=turtl) - Turtl is a privacy-focused encrypted notebook designed for storing notes, bookmarks, and research material. All data is encrypted before leaving your device
- [Zettlr](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=zettlr) - Privacy-first, open-source markdown writing and publication workbench with Zettelkasten support, citation management, and LaTeX/Word export `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 13k

## Private calendars

- [EteSync](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=etesync) - EteSync provides end-to-end encrypted synchronization for calendars, contacts, and tasks. It works with existing calendar apps while keeping all metadata private `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 267
- [Mailfence Calendar](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=mailfencecalendar) - Mailfence Calendar is part of a secure email and productivity suite based in Belgium. It supports encryption, digital signatures, and privacy-friendly collaboration
- [Nextcloud Calendar](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=nextcloudcalendar) - Nextcloud Calendar is a self-hosted calendar solution that integrates with encrypted file storage and collaboration tools. Ideal for users who want full control over their data
- [Proton Calendar](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=protoncalendar) - Proton Calendar is a privacy-first calendar with end-to-end encryption, ensuring that only you can access your events. Developed by the creators of Proton Mail and based in Switzerland
- [Skiff Calendar](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=skiffcalendar) - Skiff Calendar was an end-to-end encrypted calendar service focused on privacy and collaboration. The project has been discontinued, but it influenced modern encrypted productivity tools
- [Tuta Calendar](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=tutacalendar) - Tuta Calendar offers end-to-end encrypted scheduling with a strict no-tracking policy. All calendar data remains encrypted, including event titles and notifications

## Private translation

- [Argos Translate](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=argostranslate) - Argos Translate is an offline, open-source translation tool that keeps all translations local to your device. Ideal for maximum privacy without cloud processing `MIT` ⭐ 6.2k
- [DeepL](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=deepl) - DeepL offers industry-leading translation quality with strong privacy commitments. Texts are not stored when using paid plans, making it suitable for sensitive and professional translations
- [LibreTranslate](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=libretranslate) - LibreTranslate is a fully open-source machine translation engine that does not track users. It can be self-hosted and is widely used by privacy-focused platforms `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 15k
- [Lingva](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=lingva) - Lingva provides translations through a privacy-friendly frontend, removing tracking and ads. It allows users to translate text without directly interacting with Google services `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 1.8k

## Privacy-focused OS

- [GrapheneOS](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=grapheneos) - GrapheneOS is a security-focused mobile OS with strong sandboxing, memory protections, and minimal attack surface, designed for Pixel devices ⭐ 509
- [Headscale](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=headscale) - Open-source self-hosted implementation of the Tailscale control server for creating private WireGuard-based overlay networks and VPN infrastructures `BSD-3-Clause` ⭐ 41k
- [MentraOS](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=mentraos) - Open-source smart glasses operating system and application platform that enables developers to build once and run across multiple smart-glasses devices `MIT` ⭐ 2.2k
- [OpenWrt](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=openwrt) - Open-source Linux-based operating system for routers and embedded devices with package management, full customization, and long-term device support ⭐ 27k
- [PureOS](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=pureos) - PureOS is a GNU/Linux distribution endorsed by the Free Software Foundation, focusing on privacy, security, and freedom from proprietary software
- [Qubes OS](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=qubesos) - Qubes OS isolates applications into separate virtual machines to contain breaches. Even if one app is compromised, the rest of the system remains protected
- [Tails](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=tails) - Tails is a live operating system that routes all traffic through Tor and leaves no trace on the computer after shutdown. Ideal for journalists, activists, and high-risk users
- [Ubuntu](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=ubuntu) - Ubuntu can be hardened for privacy by disabling telemetry and using privacy-friendly defaults, making it a balanced choice for everyday users transitioning from Windows
- [Ventoy](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=ventoy) - Open source tool to create bootable USB drives from ISO/WIM/IMG/VHD(x)/EFI files — copy multiple images, pick one at boot, no reformatting needed `GPL-3.0` ⭐ 78k
- [Whonix](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=whonix) - Whonix forces all network traffic through Tor using a secure gateway/workstation architecture, reducing the risk of IP leaks and tracking

## Windows hardening

- [Files](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=files) - Modern open-source file manager for Windows featuring tabs, dual-pane layouts, file tags, cloud integrations, and a polished native user experience `MIT` ⭐ 44k
- [O&O ShutUp10++](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=oandoshutup10) - O&O ShutUp10++ allows users to disable Windows telemetry, tracking, location services, and background data collection with simple toggles
- [optimizerDuck](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=optimizerduck) - Open-source Windows optimization and debloating utility focused on performance, privacy, system cleanup, and user control ⭐ 5k
- [SimpleWall](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=simplewall) - SimpleWall provides a lightweight interface for Windows Filtering Platform, allowing users to block unwanted outbound connections and telemetry
- [W10Privacy](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=w10privacy) - W10Privacy exposes hundreds of Windows privacy and security settings, giving advanced users granular control over data collection and services
- [Windows 10 LTSC](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=windows10ltsc) - Windows 10 LTSC removes consumer apps, ads, and frequent feature updates, making it a more stable and less intrusive Windows edition for privacy-minded users
- [WindowsSpyBlocker](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=windowsspyblocker) - WindowsSpyBlocker blocks Microsoft telemetry using firewall rules, hosts files, and registry tweaks for users who want deeper control `MIT` ⭐ 5.1k
- [WinUtil](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=winutil) - WinUtil removes bloatware, disables telemetry, and applies sensible privacy defaults using a transparent open-source PowerShell interface `MIT` ⭐ 57k

- [LineageOS](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=lineageos) - LineageOS is a free and open-source Android distribution offering long-term updates, customization, and reduced vendor tracking

- [OpenLogi](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=openlogi) - Native, local-first Logitech Options+ alternative written in Rust that lets users remap buttons, configure DPI and SmartShift, and manage device profiles without telemetry or cloud services `Apache-2.0` ⭐ 5.5k
- [RustDesk](https://digitalescapetools.com/tools/tool.html?id=rustdesk) - Open-source remote desktop software with self-hosting support, end-to-end control, and cross-platform remote access `AGPL-3.0` ⭐ 117k

## Contributing

This README is **machine-generated**. Pull requests that edit it directly will be closed — run `npm run generate` after updating source data instead.

To suggest a new tool or correction:

- **[Open a GitHub issue](issues/new?template=suggest-tool.yml)** (preferred)
- **[Contact us on the website](https://digitalescapetools.com/contact.html)**
